data.body: DONE — conformance suite shipped (commit ca9651da). All 5 ACs: (1) fail-open MATRIX 6 backends x 7 modes, each driving the REAL path → abstain(closed reason)+coverage, never raise/false-absent; invalid-detector cell asserts scan CONTINUES (spike E1); in-process hang+segfault via worker boundary; (2) refutation-yield eval on rebar's OWN src (independent real corpus) = MEASURED 75.4% yield, 0 false-refute / 121 controls; (3) hazard class — collision + member/dotted → ABSTAIN (guard-the-guard reasons pinned); deps workspace/import-vs-dist; unsupported-lang + lang-extension; (4) non-adoption: extra absent → core+grounding import CLEAN (subprocess sys.modules check), queries fail open zero-footprint; (5) coverage reconstructs ran-vs-skipped across a mixed-language run. 199 tests pass. CODE REVIEW (subagent): no BLOCKER/MAJOR, VERIFIED the matrix exercises real subprocesses/ctags/semgrep + the eval is non-self-fulfilling; closed 2 MINOR guard-the-guard gaps. NO fail-open gap found in src — all invariants hold. Closing.
